title: RML Hospital Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: RML Hospital Holdings Services is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
